{# Adapted from: - djangoproject.com/docs/templates/docs/search_results.html - sphinx/themes/basic/search.html #} {% extends "basic/search.html" %} {% block header_title_content %}{{ title }}{% endblock %} {% block toc_wrapper %}{% endblock %} {% block breadcrumbs_wrapper %}{% endblock %} {% block browse_wrapper %}{% endblock %} {% block body %} {% block scriptwarning %}{{ super() }}{% endblock %} {% block searchtext %}{# empty -- skip note about search behavior #}{% endblock %} {% block searchbox %}{# empty -- search box is in header #}{% endblock %} {% block searchresults %}{{ super() }}{% endblock %} {% endblock body %}
